nodes.title: Example nagative
widgets_values: censored, mosaic censoring, bar censor, pixelated, glowing, bloom, blurry, out of focus, low detail, bad anatomy, ugly, overexposed, underexposed, distorted face, extra limbs, cartoonish, 3d render artifacts, duplicate people, unnatural lighting, bad composition, missing shadows, low resolution, poorly textured, glitch, noise, grain, static, motionless, still frame, stylized, artwork, painting, illustration, many people in background, three legs, walking backward, unnatural skin tone, discolored eyelid, red eyelids, closed eyes, poorly drawn hands, extra fingers, fused fingers, poorly drawn face, deformed, disfigured, malformed limbs, fog, mist, voluminous eyelashes,

### Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-*.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── LTX23_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │   └── LTX23_video_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │   └── taeltx2_3.safetensors
│   ├───📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── gemma_3_12B_it_*.safetensors
│   │   └── ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors 
│   ├───📂 latent_upscale_models/ 
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-temporal-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors
│   ├───📂 loras
│   │   ├── 📂 LTX
│   │   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-*.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Usage (basic)
widgets_values:
1. Download and select the models and checkpoints to use
2. Select models and files inside the settings and backend UI
3. Enable at the "Type" switch what Workflow type to use
4. Choose at the "VAE" switch what type of VAE processing to use
5. Select at the "Audio" switch what the audio source should be
6. (optional) Set any "Extra" feature you want to use
7. (optional) Enable any extra post processing you like
### Spacial settings
| Setting | Description |
|--------:|------------:|
| Headroom | Used by chunking. Set a multiplayer for available VRAM. |
| T2V dimensions | If T2V is used this will set the aspect and resolution of T2V output. |

nodes.title: ⚙️ Chunking Headroom
widgets_values:
Chunking is automatically calculated based on video length in seconds and the input resolution.

You can set the headroom based on your available VRAM for optimized chunking.

## Suggestion

| Headroom | VRAM |
|--------:|------------:|
| 1.0 | 24GB |
| 2.0 | 16GB |
| 3.0 | 12GB |
| 4.0 | 8GB |

nodes.title: 🔱 TritonVAE
widgets_values:
Enables Triton patched VAE on VAE decode loading.

Slow first run for optimization, massive speed-up on successive runs.

nodes.title: Changelog
widgets_values:
## Requirements - [ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite) - [rgthree-comfy](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy) - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) - [ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes](https://github.com/darksidewalker/ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes) - [ffmpeg](https://www.ffmpeg.org/) - [Sage Attention](https://github.com/thu-ml/SageAttention) (optional) - [Upscaler model](https://openmodeldb.info/) (optional) - [LTX LoRAs](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2) (optional) --- ## Features - 🎥 **I2V, FLF2V, T2V, V2V** + Audio - 🤝 **Video resolution matching** - Fully automatic scaling - ⚙️ **Chunking** (Seconds/Frame based) - 🎞️ **LTX Latent Upscaler** (2x native latent) - 🪫 **Low VRAM optimizations** - ✨ **Multiple Resolution Upscalers** - 🔗 **VAE options** - Full VAE or Tiled VAE
- 🔊 **Multiple Audio options** - 🫥 **Watermark** option - 📢 **Soundmark** option - 🧮 **Color transfer** feature - 🔖 **Bookmark-Shortcuts** - with number keys --- ## Latest Changes / Fixes - TritonVAE (patcher) for massive speed-up - Added DMD Distilled lora suggestion - Added Torch enabled simple upscaler - Added Advanced Video Combine Node - Removed deprecated Frame Extraction - UX fixes - Scheduler optimizations

nodes.title: Load Latent Upscale Model spatial 2x resolution

widgets_values:
a: Total Frames

b: Width

c: Height

d: VRAM Headroom (use 1.0 for 24GB, 2.0 for 16GB, 3.0 for 12 GB, 4.0 for 8 GB)
